chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1059 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6588/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6589/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6590/2025 (R/Surety) 19.11.2025 Mr. Rahmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Imdad alias Ahmedan, Basheer Ahmed and Wazeer, who on 05.11.2025, were granted protective bail for a period of three days, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- each, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original special savings certificate amounting to Rs.50,000/-, had surrendered before the trial Court and have obtained interim pre- arrest bail, as is evident from letter dated 06.11.2025 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
